antiExamples: generic AI dashboard / assistant / meeting-room / summary
no visible state change on interaction (static mockup)
abstract benefit with no visible mechanism
noveltyDefinition: legibleな表面(分かりやすい・一般人が即イメージできる)＋grounded(ハッカソン受賞作/テックsourceを忠実に少しずらす)で非自明な切り口(cut)。両極端NG=(a)generic fluff(学校お便り等=切り口なし)と(b)抽象すぎるAI-meta(思考トレース等=分かりにくい)。topicCardsの生活/civicをdestinationにしない。完全な奇抜さは狙わない。personaは磨かない。legibility=積極的な合格条件(v3)。

disagreements: reviewer-judge gave novelty 4-5 even to human-rejected g2/g3/g6 -> judge non-discriminating; use rubric north + human eye for novelty

diagnosis: concept discards tech-rich sourceProductCards (hackathon winners) and lands on generic civic topicCards (identical across scenarios) -> theme convergence. Fix at concept stage (in scope).
note: v2 reflects baseline taste calibration (rubric.md §4). Bump version on each taste revision. Canonical doc: rubric.md.
